overview: New Life Functional Medicine specializes in hormone replacement therapy for women using a functional medicine approach to identify and address underlying health concerns. The clinic offers multiple hormone delivery methods including pellets, patches, creams, and compounded formulations, combined with specialty lab testing and lifestyle guidance.
highlights: Multiple hormone delivery methods: pellets, patches, creams, and compounded formulations
Specialty lab testing including Dutch test and Genova Diagnostics
Functional medicine consultation with diet and lifestyle guidance
targetAudience: Women who have completed childbearing, particularly those in menopause or with permanent contraception.
